headline: Bank of Canada expected to hold rates despite Middle East oil shock
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America economists suggest the Bank of Canada will maintain its current policy rate of 2.25% throughout the year. Analysts led by Carlos Capistran argue that domestic economic weakness provides a sufficient buffer against rising energy costs. "The bar for the BoC to hike rates this year is quite high, and our baseline is that the BoC will remain on hold for the foreseeable future," the report states. headline: Can Procter & Gamble's Supply Chain Overhaul Withstand Volatility?
summary: PG's Supply Chain 3.0 drives efficiency with AI, automation and digital tools, boosting margins while strengthening resilience amid cost pressures.

headline: Is crude & diesel the next gold? Strategist answers
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies hiked its long-term oil price forecasts, contending that the forward curve no longer reflects the structural realities facing global energy markets, as supply constraints tighten and geopolitical risk to energy infrastructure intensifies.

headline: Why The Narrative Around Cresco Labs (CNSX:CL) Is Shifting After Trimmed Price Target
summary: Cresco Labs is back in focus after analysts adjusted their price target to CA$2.25 from CA$2.50, alongside a refreshed fair value estimate of CA$2.44. The new target sits closer to updated valuation work and keeps a Speculative Buy label in place, indicating a mix of perceived upside and meaningful execution risk. Read on to see what this shift could mean for your thesis and how to stay aligned with the evolving analyst narrative. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Cresco Labs shifts by...
